content.text: RBAC is in place. Now I'll create the full CockroachDB deployment manifest and apply it.

input.content:
---
apiVersion: v1
kind: Service
metadata:
  name: crdb-cluster
  namespace: cockroachdb
  labels:
    app.kubernetes.io/name: cockroachdb
    app.kubernetes.io/instance: crdb-cluster
spec:
  clusterIP: None
  publishNotReadyAddresses: true
  selector:
    app.kubernetes.io/name: cockroachdb
    app.kubernetes.io/instance: crdb-cluster
  ports:
    - name: grpc
      port: 26257
      targetPort: 26257
    - name: http
      port: 8080
      targetPort: 8080
---
apiVersion: v1
kind: Service
metadata:
  name: crdb-cluster-public
  namespace: cockroachdb
  labels:
    app.kubernetes.io/name: cockroachdb
    app.kubernetes.io/instance: crdb-cluster
spec:
  selector:
    app.kubernetes.io/name: cockroachdb
    app.kubernetes.io/instance: crdb-cluster
  ports:
    - name: grpc
      port: 26257
      targetPort: 26257
    - name: http
      port: 8080
      targetPort: 8080
---
apiVersion: policy/v1
kind: PodDisruptionBudget
metadata:
  name: crdb-cluster-pdb
  namespace: cockroachdb
spec:
  minAvailable: 2
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app.kubernetes.io/name: cockroachdb
      app.kubernetes.io/instance: crdb-cluster
---
apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: StatefulSet
metadata:
  name: crdb-cluster
  namespace: cockroachdb
  labels:
    app.kubernetes.io/name: cockroachdb
    app.kubernetes.io/instance: crdb-cluster
spec:
  replicas: 3
  serviceName: crdb-cluster
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app.kubernetes.io/name: cockroachdb
      app.kubernetes.io/instance: crdb-cluster
  podManagementPolicy: Parallel
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app.kubernetes.io/name: cockroachdb
        app.kubernetes.io/instance: crdb-cluster
    spec:
      serviceAccountName: crdb-cluster-sa
      terminationGracePeriodSeconds: 60
      containers:
        - name: cockroachdb
          image: cockroachdb/cockroach:v24.1.0
          imagePullPolicy: IfNotPresent
          ports:
            - name: grpc
              containerPort: 26257
            - name: http
              containerPort: 8080
          command:
            - /bin/bash
            - -ecx
            - |
              exec /cockroach/cockroach start \
                --insecure \
                --advertise-host=$(hostname -f) \
                --http-addr=0.0.0.0:8080 \
                --listen-addr=0.0.0.0:26257 \
                --join=crdb-cluster-0.crdb-cluster.cockroachdb.svc.cluster.local:26257,crdb-cluster-1.crdb-cluster.cockroachdb.svc.cluster.local:26257,crdb-cluster-2.crdb-cluster.cockroachdb.svc.cluster.local:26257 \
                --cache=25% \
                --max-sql-memory=25%
          env:
            - name: COCKROACH_CHANNEL
              value: kubernetes-insecure
          livenessProbe:
            httpGet:
              path: /health
              port: http
            initialDelaySeconds: 30
            periodSeconds: 5
          readinessProbe:
            httpGet:
              path: /health?ready=1
              port: http
            initialDelaySeconds: 10
            periodSeconds: 5
            failureThreshold: 2
          volumeMounts:
            - name: datadir
              mountPath: /cockroach/cockroach-data
  volumeClaimTemplates:
    - metadata:
        name: datadir
      spec:
        accessModes: ["ReadWriteOnce"]
        resources:
          requests:
            storage: 10Gi

cat > /tmp/crdb-cluster.yaml << 'EOF'
---
apiVersion: v1
kind: Service
metadata:
  name: crdb-cluster
  namespace: cockroachdb
  labels:
    app.kubernetes.io/name: cockroachdb
    app.kubernetes.io/instance: crdb-cluster
spec:
  clusterIP: None
  publishNotReadyAddresses: true
  selector:
    app.kubernetes.io/name: cockroachdb
    app.kubernetes.io/instance: crdb-cluster
  ports:
    - name: grpc
      port: 26257
      targetPort: 26257
    - name: http
      port: 8080
      targetPort: 8080
---
apiVersion: v1
kind: Service
metadata:
  name: crdb-cluster-public
  namespace: cockroachdb
  labels:
    app.kubernetes.io/name: cockroachdb
    app.kubernetes.io/instance: crdb-cluster
spec:
  selector:
    app.kubernetes.io/name: cockroachdb
    app.kubernetes.io/instance: crdb-cluster
  ports:
    - name: grpc
      port: 26257
      targetPort: 26257
    - name: http
      port: 8080
      targetPort: 8080
---
apiVersion: policy/v1
kind: PodDisruptionBudget
metadata:
  name: crdb-cluster-pdb
  namespace: cockroachdb
spec:
  minAvailable: 2
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app.kubernetes.io/name: cockroachdb
      app.kubernetes.io/instance: crdb-cluster
---
apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: StatefulSet
metadata:
  name: crdb-cluster
  namespace: cockroachdb
  labels:
    app.kubernetes.io/name: cockroachdb
    app.kubernetes.io/instance: crdb-cluster
spec:
  replicas: 3
  serviceName: crdb-cluster
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app.kubernetes.io/name: cockroachdb
      app.kubernetes.io/instance: crdb-cluster
  podManagementPolicy: Parallel
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app.kubernetes.io/name: cockroachdb
        app.kubernetes.io/instance: crdb-cluster
    spec:
      serviceAccountName: crdb-cluster-sa
      terminationGracePeriodSeconds: 60
      containers:
        - name: cockroachdb
          image: cockroachdb/cockroach:v24.1.0
          imagePullPolicy: IfNotPresent
          ports:
            - name: grpc
              containerPort: 26257
            - name: http
              containerPort: 8080
          command:
            - /bin/bash
            - -ecx
            - |
              exec /cockroach/cockroach start \
                --insecure \
                --advertise-host=$(hostname -f) \
                --http-addr=0.0.0.0:8080 \
                --listen-addr=0.0.0.0:26257 \
                --join=crdb-cluster-0.crdb-cluster.cockroachdb.svc.cluster.local:26257,crdb-cluster-1.crdb-cluster.cockroachdb.svc.cluster.local:26257,crdb-cluster-2.crdb-cluster.cockroachdb.svc.cluster.local:26257 \
                --cache=25% \
                --max-sql-memory=25%
          env:
            - name: COCKROACH_CHANNEL
              value: kubernetes-insecure
          livenessProbe:
            httpGet:
              path: /health
              port: http
            initialDelaySeconds: 30
            periodSeconds: 5
          readinessProbe:
            httpGet:
              path: /health?ready=1
              port: http
            initialDelaySeconds: 10
            periodSeconds: 5
            failureThreshold: 2
          volumeMounts:
            - name: datadir
              mountPath: /cockroach/cockroach-data
  volumeClaimTemplates:
    - metadata:
        name: datadir
      spec:
        accessModes: ["ReadWriteOnce"]
        resources:
          requests:
            storage: 10Gi
EOF
echo "manifest written"

input.command:
for i in $(seq 1 30); do
  echo "--- attempt $i ---"
  kubectl -n cockroachdb get pods -o wide 2>&1
  READY=$(kubectl -n cockroachdb get pods --no-headers 2>/dev/null | grep -c "Running" || true)
  echo "Running pods: $READY"
  if [ "$READY" -ge 3 ]; then
    echo "All 3 pods Running!"
    break
  fi
  sleep 10
done

content.text: Pods are running. Now I'll initialize the cluster with `cockroach init` and verify everything.

input.command:
# Wait for pods to be Ready (readiness probe passes)
for i in $(seq 1 20); do
  READY=$(kubectl -n cockroachdb get pods --no-headers 2>/dev/null | grep "1/1" | wc -l)
  echo "Ready pods: $READY/3"
  if [ "$READY" -ge 1 ]; then
    break
  fi
  sleep 5
done

# Run cockroach init to bootstrap the cluster
kubectl -n cockroachdb exec crdb-cluster-0 -- /cockroach/cockroach init --insecure --host=crdb-cluster-0.crdb-cluster.cockroachdb.svc.cluster.local:26257 2>&1 || true
input.description: Wait for readiness then initialize the CockroachDB cluster
